title: Open-Source AI Agents
summary: Reviewed published projects with public source links and agent, workflow automation, or developer infrastructure relevance.
inclusionCriteria: Projects must be reviewed published projections, carry the finite open-source-ai-agents collection tag, and appear in this manual allowlist.
whyIncluded: These projects are reviewed CONTENT27 published projections with public project pages and agent, automation, or developer workflow context.
methodologyNote: Collections are finite reviewed groups. They are not generated from arbitrary filters, query parameters, external crawls, or bulk templates.

title: RAG Projects
summary: Reviewed published projects connected to retrieval, vector search, or knowledge-base infrastructure workflows.
inclusionCriteria: Projects must be reviewed published projections, carry the finite rag-projects collection tag, and appear in this manual allowlist.
whyIncluded: These projects are reviewed CONTENT27 published projections with retrieval, vector database, or RAG workflow context.
methodologyNote: This collection is a finite discovery surface. It does not recalculate scores or infer private adoption data.

title: AI Outbound
summary: Reviewed published projects with public product context for outbound, productivity, automation, or go-to-market workflows.
inclusionCriteria: Projects must be reviewed published projections, carry the finite ai-outbound collection tag, and appear in this manual allowlist.
whyIncluded: These projects are reviewed CONTENT27 published projections with public context for outbound, productivity, automation, or go-to-market workflows.
methodologyNote: Collection membership is reviewed and finite. It does not verify customers, revenue, financing, or private outcomes.

title: AI Tool Alternatives
summary: Reviewed published projects that support neutral discovery across current AI tool categories.
inclusionCriteria: Projects must be reviewed published projections, carry the finite ai-tool-alternatives collection tag, and appear in this manual allowlist.
whyIncluded: These projects are reviewed CONTENT27 published projections that can support neutral AI tool discovery across the current project index.
methodologyNote: Alternatives context is neutral discovery support. It does not order, endorse, or predict outcomes for projects.
